steps.title: Rewrite the given line
steps.content:
Put the equation in slope-intercept form.
$$
3x=24y-12
$$
$$
24y=3x+12
$$
$$
y=\frac{1}{8}x+\frac{1}{2}
$$

steps.title: Use parallel distinct lines
steps.content: A system has no solution when the two lines are parallel and distinct. The second line must have slope $\frac{1}{8}$ but a different $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Check the matching choice
steps.content: Rewrite the matching equation. $$ \frac{1}{2}x=4y $$ $$ y=\frac{1}{8}x $$ It has the same slope and a different intercept. The answer is B.
